repositoriesWithNullPluginCount.reason: Legacy discovered repository rows that have not had plugin counts backfilled yet.

repositoriesWithUntrimmedDescriptions.reason: Existing generated descriptions contain source whitespace that should be cleaned in the ingestion pipeline.

caseInsensitiveRepositoryCollisions.reason: Existing catalog contains case-only owner/repo collisions that need canonicalization.

statsGapsOverOneAndHalfDays.reason: Existing historical snapshots have known collection gaps.

statsDuplicateUtcDays.reason: Existing historical snapshots include multiple samples on the same UTC calendar day.

statsDeclines.reason: Existing historical snapshots include one repository-count decline.
